message:
feat(python): numpy.ma.masked_values wrapper parity (franken_numpy-u5rz)

Add fnp_python.masked_values(x, value, rtol=1e-5, atol=1e-8,
copy=True, shrink=True) as a passthrough delegator to
np.ma.masked_values preserving the floating-point approximate-
equality masking semantics (rtol/atol thresholds matching np.isclose
behavior on the mask predicate), copy/shrink kwarg forwarding, and
MaskedArray return type.

Covered by one pyo3 oracle test with six scenarios: float defaults
(catches near-equal 1.5000001 within rtol=1e-5), loose rtol/atol
both at 1e-3, tight rtol=atol=0.0 for exact-only matching, integer
data (falls back to exact equality), 2-D float input, and
shrink=False forwarded — each repr-compared to np.ma.masked_values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
